web.title: codex-mini-latest Model | OpenAI API
web.description: codex-mini-latest is a fine-tuned version of o4-mini specifically for use in Codex CLI. For direct use in the API, we recommend starting with gpt-4.1.

web.title: Model Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center
web.description: We're introducing GPT-4o mini, the most capable and cost-efficient small model available today. GPT-4o mini surpasses GPT-3.5 Turbo and other small models.
